title: pygeum ceylanicum
intro: Pygeum ceylanicum is a plant-based medication derived from the bark of the African cherry tree (Prunus africana), native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of pygeum ceylanicum include improving prostate health by reducing symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH), such as urinary frequency and difficulty urinating. Pygeum ceylanicum can be taken in various herbal preparations, including capsules, tablets, and teas, making it a popular natural remedy for prostate issues.
